title: TGaceAllStories
description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from TGaceAllStories, skipping any feeds with errors.

items.title: My rude, ungrateful relative gave her lawyer power of attorney — and has lived to regret it. Should I get involved?
items.description: “A person who is used to controlling others does not like being controlled.”

items.title: ‘I don’t earn enough to support us and our baby’: My unemployed husband lost $22,000 trading sports cards. What now?
items.description: “I intervened, shut the business down and got him into therapy and support for gambling-type behaviors.”

items.title: ‘When he doesn’t get money, he becomes angry’: My brother has led a life of chaos and financial ruin. What is my moral obligation?
items.description: “Without clear distance and boundaries, he will pull me down with him.”

items.title: Oil prices surge to highest in a year as fears of Middle East supply crunch grow
items.description: Oil prices rose to their highest in more than a year as traders continued to fret that supplies will be affected by conflict in the Middle East.

items.title: Blackstone said its flagship private-credit fund saw heavy outflows
items.description: Blackstone said it redeemed more investments than usual in its flagship private-credit fund, in another sign of the stress the industry is facing.

items.title: Tuesday's big stock stories: What’s likely to move the market in the next trading session
items.description: The S&P 500 made a comeback and closed marginally higher Monday as dip-buyers purchased shares amid the U.S.-Iran conflict.

items.title: Dividend Aristocrats are outperforming this year in a volatile market. These stocks are Wall Street’s favorites
items.description: CNBC Pro screened for dividend aristocrats that are rated a buy by the majority of analysts covering the stock.

items.title: Retail investors had two favorite trades during Monday's market turmoil
items.description: Mom-and-pop investors rushed into a pair of trades following the strikes on Iran.

items.title: Berkshire Hathaway shares drop nearly 5% after poor fourth-quarter results, no bold moves by new CEO Abel
items.description: Some had hoped for more aggressive signals on capital deployment given the company's swelling cash balance.

items.description: Gilead's $7.8B acquisition of Arcellx boosts shares 78% amid push for new myeloma drug. Explore the deal, market impacts, and trading insights.
